core_mechanism: monotone extension of a greedy agglomerative pairwise-merge codebook (bottom-up, frequency-driven merging that builds composite symbols each with an exact decomposition into pre-existing atoms), warm-started so carried-over atoms keep their learned vectors and every new composite is initialized as the mean of its constituents' vectors before continued re-optimization
brief_reason: The recipe continues the existing BPE merge sequence on a new corpus so most source tokens carry over unchanged and every new token has an exact decomposition into source tokens, copies old embedding rows and initializes new rows as the mean of their source sub-token embeddings, then recovers quality via continued training — an incrementally extended agglomerative-merge dictionary with mean-of-constituents warm-starting.
